name: @pryzm/plugin-rooms
description: PRYZM 2 — Rooms plugin (S25). Headless half: Store<RoomData>, typed errors, 8 handlers (CreateRoom / DeleteRoom / MoveRoom / SetRoomName / SetRoomNumber / SetRoomOccupancy / SetRoomMaterial / SetRoomHeightOffset). Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/room.ts) does the half-edge flood-fill from a seed point per ADR-0022. Wall→room cascade (boundary edits propagate the room recompute) lives in plugins/cross/wall-room.ts (S26). Committer / tool live under src/committer/.
